steps.title: Identify the subject and verb need
steps.content: The phrase before the blank, “Raymond Chang's textbook *General Chemistry: The Essential Concepts*”, is a singular subject noun phrase. The phrase after the blank, “this concept in detail.”, requires a finite verb to complete the sentence.

steps.title: Apply subject‑verb agreement
steps.content: B) discusses provides a present‑tense singular verb that agrees with the singular subject. The other choices are non‑finite verb forms (discussing, to discuss, having discussed) that cannot act as the main verb of a sentence. That matches choice B — B is correct.
